summary: spectrum_utils enables annotating observed spectrum fragments using the ProForma 2.0 specification for modified peptidoforms.
spectrum_utils uniquely supports the full ProForma 2.0 specification.
Internally, spectrum_utils represents the ProForma 2.0 specification as a formal grammar which is used to create an abstract syntax tree when parsing a ProForma string.

By default, spectrum_utils annotates peptide b and y ions during fragment ion annotation. By default in spectrum_utils, singly-charged b and y peptide fragment ions are annotated with a label in spectrum plots.
spectrum_utils supports internal fragment ions which result from two amide bond cleavages and do not contain either terminus.
spectrum_utils supports immonium ions which are internal fragments for individual amino acids formed by a b/y cleavage on the N-terminal side and an a/x cleavage on the C-terminal side.
spectrum_utils supports primary peptide fragment ions of types a, b, c, x, y, and z.
spectrum_utils supports intact precursor ions marked as type p. spectrum_utils supports reporter ions from isobaric labeling marked as type r.
